text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 39 

HOS_MDCR_PMT 

LABEL: Hospice Medicare Payments 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total Medicare payments in the hospice (HOS) setting for the year. The total 
Medicare payments for hospice are calculated as the sum of the CLM_PMT_AMT for all hospice claims 
where the CLM_PMT_AMT >= 0. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: HOS_MDCR_PMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CCW (derived)
